examples: The news came as events inside the courtroom yesterday teetered on the shambolic.
Captain Ferguson's biggest concern is the ANA's still shambolic logistics and resupply system.
But the invasion of foreign capital that so worried Mr Mantega has now turned into a shambolic retreat.
Electronics Arts has apologised for the shambolic launch of the latest version of town-planning title SimCity.
Labour's university spokesman, Pat McFadden, says a change of direction over a graduate tax is "shambolic".
